title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: The Man From Toronto
subTitle: A struggling entrepreneur plans a surprise for his wife's birthday, but due to a twist of fate, he gets caught in the middle of an operation to apprehend an assassin.

title: XXX
subTitle: The US government recruits extreme sports athlete Xander Cage to infiltrate a Russian criminal ring, which is plotting the destruction of the world.

title: The Karate Kid
subTitle: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

title: Zombieland: Double Tap
subTitle: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita and Little Rock set out on a mission to protect the rest of humanity by fighting evolved zombies while also battling their own internal demons.

title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
subTitle: A genetically modified anaconda and a giant crocodile escape captivity and enter a nearby lake. When the two massive creatures fight, the sheriff tries to prevent the town from being destroyed.

title: Armored
subTitle: Ty Hackett takes up a job in the same company where his father worked before he died. His mentor Mike convinces him to be a part of the robbery of two armoured trucks, but their plan goes haywire.

title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
subTitle: Mike and Marcus face their toughest case yet as their late captain's reputation hangs in the balance. Subsequently, they unravel a complex web of cartel connections in a high-stakes mission.

title: The Water Horse
subTitle: Young Angus Mac Morrow discovers a mysterious egg that grows up to be the Loch Ness monster. As they form a strong relationship, the boy's family refuses to believe in the creature's existence.

title: Battle: Los Angeles
subTitle: Michael Nantz, a Marine staff sergeant, renders his services again, soon after his retirement. He and his platoon have to save the city of Los Angeles from alien invaders.

title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
subTitle: A single mother and her two children move into a farmhouse inherited from her estranged father. As they settle in, they discover their associations with Ghostbusters.

title: Hotel Transylvania
subTitle: Count Dracula runs a high-end resort for monsters and is overprotective of his daughter, Mavis. When Johnny, a human, enters the hotel, Count Dracula tries to prevent Mavis from falling for him.

title: A Few Good Men
subTitle: A lawyer from the US military safeguards two US marines who are charged for killing a fellow marine and a colonel turns into the prime suspect.

title: Uncharted
subTitle: Recruited by Victor, street-smart Nathan steps into a race for the lost treasure of Ferdinand Magellan. However, a corrupt billionaire and an evil mercenary also have the same goal.

title: My Tiny Senpai
subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.
A spaceship crash lands on prehistoric Earth, leaving only two survivors. Soon, they must survive against the hostile terrain and vicious creatures.

title: Men in Black: International
subTitle: Agent M, a probationary member of the MIB, teams up with Agent H and uncovers a sinister plot that reveals a traitor in the organisation aiding an alien invasion.

title: Monster House
subTitle: Three teenagers discover that their neighbour's house is actually a monster that hates children. They then decide to destroy the heart of the house and kill it.

title: You Don't Mess With the Zohan
subTitle: Zohan, an Israeli anti-terrorist commando, stages his own death when he gets tired of his job and goes to New York City to follow his dream of being a hairstylist.

title: Fatherhood
subTitle: A widower embarks on an emotional journey while raising his daughter single-handedly despite encountering several hurdles along the way.

title: The Missing
subTitle: When rancher and single mother of two Maggie Gilkeson (Cate Blanchett) sees her teenage daughter, Lily (Evan Rachel Wood), kidnapped by Apache rebels, she reluctantly accepts the help of her estranged father, Samuel (Tommy Lee Jones), in tracking down the kidnappers. Along the way, the two must learn to reconcile the past and work together if they are going to have any hope of getting Lily back before she is taken over the border and forced to become a prostitute.

title: The Equalizer 2
subTitle: Robert McCall's close friend, Susan Plummer, is killed while investigating a murder-suicide. As a former marine and spy, he leverages his skills and resources to find the culprit and avenge her death.

title: The Pope's Exorcist
subTitle: Father Gabriele Amorth, an exorcist, uncovers a hidden conspiracy as he investigates the horrifying possession of a young boy.

title: Never Back Down 2: The Beatdown
subTitle: Four fighters from different backgrounds come together to train under a former MMA star. Ultimately, they have to fight each other and also the traitor who hides among them.

title: Morbius
subTitle: Determined to cure the disease that has plagued him his entire life, Morbius conducts a drastic experiment, which bears unforeseen consequences.

title: Venom: The Last Dance
subTitle: As Eddie and Venom are tirelessly pursued by forces from both of their worlds, they find themselves out of options and left with a shattering last resort.

title: Sound of Metal
subTitle: Ruben, a drummer, is distraught when he begins losing his hearing. However, things take a turn when he meets Joe, who heads a community comprising people with hearing impairment.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
subTitle: Spider-Man seeks the help of Doctor Strange to forget his exposed secret identity as Peter Parker. However, Strange's spell goes horribly wrong, leading to unwanted guests entering their universe.

title: My Tiny Senpai
subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
subTitle: Harold's drawings spring to life when he ventures into the real world. His purple crayon accidentally creates challenges and he and his friends must safeguard both worlds.

title: Insidious: Chapter 2
subTitle: Josh Lambert and his family relocate to his mother's old house in the hopes of recovering from past trauma. However, they soon encounter strange and chilling paranormal events.

title: Afraid
subTitle: Curtis and his family are asked to install an artificial intelligence program in their house in a bid to test it. However, they soon begin to experience disturbing occurrences.

title: A Few Good Men
subTitle: A lawyer from the US military safeguards two US marines who are charged for killing a fellow marine and a colonel turns into the prime suspect.

title: Friends With Benefits
subTitle: A recruiter from New York gets a man recruited at a company and soon, they become friends. However, things get confusing when sex is involved in their relationship.

title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
subTitle: Smurfette and her friends go to the Forbidden Forest to find a lost village. When the evil wizard Gargamel gets to know of this, he devises a plan to stop the smurfs from discovering the town.

title: Madame Web
subTitle: After a near-fatal accident, New York City paramedic Cassandra gains the ability to see into the future. Soon, her visions lead her to protect three young girls from a mysterious enemy.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

title: Gran Turismo
subTitle: With the help of a mechanic having a tragic past, an avid player of racing video games attempts to become a professional car racer.

title: Anacondas: The Hunt for the Blood Orchid
subTitle: A team of researchers is in Borneo to find the blood orchid, a flower that could hold the secret to eternal life. However, the scientists run afoul of the jungle's deadly snakes.

title: Hellboy
subTitle: Hellboy is a demonic warrior who protects the Earth from paranormal threats. When an enemy from his past makes a comeback, it is up to him and his team to stop the villain once and for all.

title: Blade Runner 2049
subTitle: K, an officer with the Los Angeles Police Department, unearths a secret that could create chaos. He goes in search of a former Blade Runner who has been missing for over three decades.

title: Don't Breathe
subTitle: Three delinquents break into the house of Norman, a Gulf War veteran who is visually impaired, to steal his money. However, they discover that Norman is not as helpless as he seems.

subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.
